title: Take a Chance on Me
overview: Marie-Line is juggling between odd jobs to support her agoraphobic father. Despite the precariousness of their lifestyle, she remains a lively and cheerful young woman. Yet, after a series of unfortunate events, she is fired from her job and sentenced by a judge to a small penalty. A few days later, this very judge will be in a position to help her get back on track – a chance for Marie-Line but also the beginning of an unlikely friendship.

trailers.title: WIE DAS LEBEN MANCHMAL SPIELT - Ab 02.10.2025 nur im Kino!
